_note: Signal copy templates. {firstName} is replaced at runtime. Old-format keys (People view) above the divider; feed_* keys (event stream) below.
comeback_30_diary: {firstName} went quiet for a while. Now they're back.
comeback_7_diary: Feels like {firstName} is working something out.
streak_25_calendar: {firstName} has been incredibly consistent this month.
streak_25_diary: There's a lot going on in {firstName}'s world right now.
streak_15_calendar: {firstName} has been showing up a lot lately.
streak_15_diary: {firstName} has been in their head lately. In a good way.
ghost_cal_1: Showed up today. Keeping it close.
ghost_cal_2: Something got done. That's all we know.
ghost_cal_3: They were here. The details are theirs.
ghost_diary_2: Something's on their mind. They're keeping it.
ghost_diary_3: There's an entry. It stays private.
ghost_diary_4: Words happened. They're not ours to read.
changed_cal_1: Plans shifted. The day's still happening.
changed_cal_3: Logged something earlier. It's gone now.
changed_cal_4: The day looked different this morning.
changed_diary_1: Wrote something earlier. It's gone now.
changed_diary_2: Had something to say. Changed their mind.
changed_diary_3: There was an entry. It didn't stay.

feed_sharing_log_streak7_3: {firstName} logged {activities}. {streak}Seven days of showing up. Every day.{/streak} {nudge}Have you shown up today?{/nudge}
